full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Given my simplified LASVM-I code, can you suggest two ablations that are easy to implement from the same codebase: one that removes the left-side robustness filter and one that removes the right-side efficiency filter? A sketch of how to structure the comparison code and metrics table would help.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped me plan two code-level ablations from the same implementation and gave me a clearer structure for the comparison outputs.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Reran both ablations on the same seeds and checked that each interpretation matched the measured outputs.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Given my simplified LASVM-I code, can you suggest two ablations that are easy to implement from the same codebase: one that removes the left-side robustness filter and one that removes the right-side efficiency filter? A sketch of how to structure the comparison code and metrics table would help.
top_5_prompts.why_important: This prompt shows targeted experimental-design help and some code scaffolding, not full delegation.

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for Task 3.1.
